runs.session: Post-commit deployment readiness audit (4 new commits since last run)
findings_noted: [MEDIUM] Competition grade save errors still console.error only (line 128 playerDb.js) — user gets no feedback. Design choice: grade failure shouldn't void player save. Carried forward from prior audit.
new_commits_reviewed: 211bff0: dev auth UUID fix + .maybeSingle() + null guards — all correct, no regressions
80cd5d2: CompLevelSel UX improvements — useMemo prevents infinite loops, auto-assoc works
66f4f58: Password visibility toggle — aria-label present, type toggles correctly
4436c1d: Lazy PDF deps, focus trap, validation, null guards — all correct patterns
patterns_learned: Dev bypass IDs must be valid UUIDs to avoid FK violations (DEV_UUID pattern)
Always use .maybeSingle() when row may not exist — .single() throws PGRST116
Guard .toUpperCase() with || fallback when data might be null from Supabase
Use userProfile?.id not userProfile as useEffect dep — object reference changes trigger re-fetch
Modals need Escape close + Tab focus trap + cleanup on unmount
useRef for debounce timers — confirms incident #5 prevention pattern

findings_fixed: [CRITICAL] user_profiles.submitted never set after onboarding — players looped back to empty form on refresh
[HIGH] Mock data served to coaches in production — no DEV guard on MOCK fallback
[HIGH] saveAssessmentToDB silently swallowed upsert errors — no error check on result
[HIGH] PlayerPortal used userProfile.name (doesn't exist) instead of userProfile.full_name
[HIGH] savePlayerToDB returned null on error instead of throwing
[HIGH] Competition grade insert errors silently swallowed
[MEDIUM] markAttendance wrote to non-existent updated_at column — every upsert failed
[MEDIUM] PlayerPortal attendance used auth UUID instead of players.id — always empty
[MEDIUM] Static _isDesktop flag never updated on resize — migrated 15+ call sites to dynamic
[LOW] Calibration loaders returned null instead of throwing
[LOW] PDF generation errors invisible to user — added toast feedback
patterns_learned: user_profiles.submitted is the portal routing gate — must be synced when players.submitted is set
Supabase upsert() returns { data, error } — must destructure and check error
attendance table has no updated_at column — code must not write to it
userProfile uses full_name not name — Supabase column naming
Mock data fallback must be behind import.meta.env.DEV flag

runs.session: E2E player profile testing + coach pipeline testing
findings_fixed: [MEDIUM] calcCohortPercentile could return >100% in small cohorts — added Math.min(100,...)
[MEDIUM] PDI could exceed 5.0 scale max when CCM multiplied CSS above 5.0 — added Math.min(5,...)
patterns_learned: CCM multiplier can push CSS values above 5.0 — always clamp PDI to scale max
Cohort percentile formula below/(length-1)*100 exceeds 100 when player is in allPlayers array
Supabase null vs JS undefined: save transforms produce null, load returns null not undefined
Questionnaire answers (12 questions) can outweigh coach archetype assignment (3.0 weight) in DNA calc
Archetype DNA percentages must sum to 100 — normalise() function handles rounding
Save/load symmetry: every rating key must survive cd → saveTransform → loadTransform → cd
Coach assessment key counts vary by role — batter t2=4, pace/spin t2=6, keeper t2=10, allrounder t2=5

position_indexed_arrays.description: BAT_ITEMS, PACE_ITEMS, SPIN_ITEMS, KEEP_ITEMS, IQ_ITEMS, MN_ITEMS — NEVER reorder, only append
position_indexed_arrays.check: Count items and compare to expected: BAT=10, PACE=10, SPIN=10, KEEP=8, IQ=6, MN=7, PH=5 per role

null_vs_undefined.description: Supabase returns null for missing JSONB fields. JS save transforms use || null. Load side uses || {} for spreading.
null_vs_undefined.check: Symmetry test: save(load(save(cd))) must equal save(cd)

engine_scale_bounds.description: PDI max 5.0, pdiPct max 100, cohort percentile max 100, age score max 100
engine_scale_bounds.check: Verify Math.min() clamps on all score outputs

dual_layer_sagi.description: Internal (confidence - frequency within player) + Cross-layer (player domain avg vs coach domain avg). Blend 60/40 when both available.
dual_layer_sagi.check: Run SAGI with over/under/aligned self-data and verify correct labels

archetype_v3.description: 12 MCQ questions per discipline. scoreArchetypeAnswers() normalises to 0-100%. Dual threshold 15% for secondary archetype.
archetype_v3.check: Run scoreBatArchetype with known bias answers and verify primary identification

junior_cutoff.description: getCricketAge() < 14 = junior. Different question sets, rating labels, matchup wording.

coach_ui_gaps.description: fld_ (Athletic Fielding) and pwr_ (Power Hitting) pillars exist in engine but have no coach UI inputs. Power Hitting falls back to t1_4/t1_9.
coach_ui_gaps.check: Verify engine handles zero fld_ and pwr_ data gracefully

submitted_sync.description: user_profiles.submitted must be set to true after successful savePlayerToDB in PlayerOnboarding. This is the portal routing gate.
submitted_sync.check: grep for supabase.from('user_profiles').update({ submitted: true }) in PlayerOnboarding submit handler

mock_data_guard.description: MOCK data fallback in CoachAssessment must be gated behind import.meta.env.DEV
mock_data_guard.check: grep import.meta.env.DEV in MOCK usage context

responsive_dynamic.description: All responsive checks must use isDesktop() function, not static _isDesktop constant
responsive_dynamic.check: Zero imports of _isDesktop, dkWrap, DSZ, DSF from theme.js outside theme.js itself

dev_uuid_format.description: Dev bypass user IDs must be valid UUID format to avoid FK constraint violations in Supabase
dev_uuid_format.check: DEV_UUID matches UUID v4 format: 8-4-4-4-12 hex digits

maybe_single.description: Use .maybeSingle() not .single() when a row may not exist. .single() throws PGRST116 on zero rows.
maybe_single.check: Search for .single() in player-facing code — should all be .maybeSingle()

null_toUpperCase.description: Guard .toUpperCase() calls with || fallback when data comes from Supabase (null possible)
null_toUpperCase.check: grep toUpperCase in .jsx files and verify null guard present

useEffect_primitive_deps.description: Use primitive values (userProfile?.id) not objects (userProfile) as useEffect dependencies to prevent infinite re-fetches
useEffect_primitive_deps.check: grep useEffect deps for object references — should use .id or .key

incident_history.description: RLS policy change locked out login flow
incident_history.root_cause: Security hardening removed anon SELECT on program_members
incident_history.prevention: Always trace which role (anon vs authenticated) executes each query before changing RLS

incident_history.root_cause: Count of promises and destructured variables didn't match
incident_history.prevention: For every Promise.all, count promises and destructured variables — must match in order

incident_history.description: Env var changes without server restart
incident_history.root_cause: Vite caches env vars at startup
incident_history.prevention: Restart Vite dev server after any .env change

incident_history.description: React hooks inside conditionals → white screen
incident_history.prevention: Search every .jsx file — hooks must be at top level of component
Never reference React state inside setTimeout — use useRef

incident_history.description: JSONB shape mismatch between writer and reader
incident_history.root_cause: Writer used different key names than reader expected
incident_history.prevention: For every new data write, trace ALL readers and verify key names match

incident_history.root_cause: savePlayerToDB writes to players table but routing checks user_profiles
incident_history.prevention: submitted_sync pattern check on every audit

incident_history.description: Mock data shown to coaches in production
incident_history.root_cause: No DEV guard on MOCK fallback in refreshPlayers
incident_history.prevention: mock_data_guard pattern check on every audit

incident_history.root_cause: Code wrote to a column that was never created
incident_history.prevention: Schema sync check — verify every written column exists in live DB

incident_history.description: PlayerPortal used auth UUID for attendance query
incident_history.root_cause: attendance.player_id stores players.id not auth user UUID
incident_history.prevention: Trace ID types across table boundaries

incident_history.root_cause: CCM multiplier pushed CSS above 5.0, no clamp
incident_history.prevention: engine_scale_bounds pattern check on every audit

incident_history.root_cause: below/(length-1)*100 formula exceeds 100 when player in allPlayers
incident_history.prevention: engine_scale_bounds pattern check on every audit

regression_checklist: user_profiles.submitted sync in PlayerOnboarding submit handler
Mock data DEV guard in CoachAssessment refreshPlayers
savePlayerToDB throws on insert error (not return null)
PlayerPortal looks up players.id from auth_user_id before attendance query
PDI clamped to 5.0, pdiPct to 100, cohort to 100
